title: polypodium cuneatum
intro: Polypodium cuneatum is a species of fern native to Australia and New Zealand, belonging to the family Polypodiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been employed to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and acting as an antiseptic to prevent infection. Polypodium cuneatum can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
